scripts.studio:db:reset: docker compose -f compose.studio.yml down -v && docker compose -f compose.studio.yml up -d --wait studio-postgres
scripts.studio:local:bootstrap: pnpm studio:db:up && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/high_ground_studio pnpm db:generate && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/high_ground_studio pnpm db:push && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/high_ground_studio pnpm studio:smoke:persistence
scripts.studio:cloudbuild:image:sha: gcloud builds submit --config cloudbuild.studio.yaml --substitutions=_IMAGE_TAG=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) .
